hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁；【CRYPTO】摩根士丹利以市场领先的低费用加入比特币 ETF 竞赛；【CRYPTO】欧洲央行文件发现 DeFi 治理集中，警告结果可能影响“监管锚点”。

items.title: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
items.summary: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁
items.summary_zh: Citrini Research 表示，持续居高不下的能源价格可能会给消费者和企业盈利带来压力，给股市带来艰难的背景。

items.title: Morgan Stanley enters bitcoin ETF race with market-leading low fee
items.summary: The bank priced its proposed spot bitcoin fund at 14 basis points, making it the lowest fund on the market, if approved.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利以市场领先的低费用加入比特币 ETF 竞赛
items.summary_zh: 该银行将其拟议的现货比特币基金定价为 14 个基点，如果获得批准，这将使其成为市场上最低的基金。

items.title: ECB paper finds DeFi governance concentrated, warns results could affect ‘regulatory anchor points’
items.summary: ECB research finds large percentages of DeFi governance tokens are tied to exchanges and protocol-linked wallets.
items.title_zh: 欧洲央行文件发现 DeFi 治理集中，警告结果可能影响“监管锚点”
items.summary_zh: 欧洲央行的研究发现，很大一部分 DeFi 治理代币与交易所和协议相关钱包相关。

items.title: Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback: 'The tug of war is just starting'
items.summary: Wall Street banks may finally be getting a long-awaited opening to claw back market share from private credit lenders.
items.title_zh: 私人信贷为华尔街银行卷土重来打开了大门：“拉锯战才刚刚开始”
items.summary_zh: 华尔街银行可能终于获得了期待已久的机会，可以从私人信贷机构手中夺回市场份额。

items.title: Sen. Warren rips Federal Reserve chair pick Kevin Warsh: 'You have learned nothing from your failures'
items.summary: Kevin Warsh's nomination as chair of the Federal Reserve has been in limbo because of a criminal investigation of Chair Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 参议员沃伦痛批美联储主席人选凯文·沃什：“你没有从失败中学到任何东西”
items.summary_zh: 由于主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔受到刑事调查，凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 的美联储主席提名一直悬而未决。

items.title: Why Mastercard paid double for stablecoin infrastructure it could have built
items.summary: The credit card giant’s pricey payment to buy stablecoin platform, BVNK, says more than any strategy deck or earnings call ever could.
items.title_zh: 为什么万事达卡为其本可以构建的稳定币基础设施支付双倍费用
items.summary_zh: 这家信用卡巨头斥巨资购买稳定币平台 BVNK，比任何战略报告或财报电话会议都更能说明问题。

items.title: California bars officials from prediction market insider betting as federal ban takes shape
items.summary: Prediction market platforms are tightening trading restrictions and surveillance tools as concerns grow over insider participants.
items.title_zh: 随着联邦禁令的形成，加州禁止官员进行预测市场内幕押注
items.summary_zh: 随着对内部参与者的担忧日益加剧，预测市场平台正在收紧交易限制和监控工具。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran-Backed Houthis Enter War With Missile Attack on Israel
items.summary: Earlier, U.S. officials said an Iranian strike at a military base in Saudi Arabia injured 12 U.S. troops, one of the most serious breaches of American defenses since the war began.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗支持的胡塞武装对以色列发动导弹袭击
items.summary_zh: 早些时候，美国官员表示，伊朗对沙特阿拉伯军事基地的袭击造成 12 名美军受伤，这是自战争开始以来对美国防御最严重的破坏之一。

items.title: Anthropic’s massive 'Claude Mythos' leak sends software names — and crypto — sharply lower
items.summary: The model could significantly heighten cybersecurity risks by rapidly finding and exploiting software vulnerabilities, potentially accelerating a cyber arms race.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的大规模“Claude Mythos”泄露导致软件名称和加密货币大幅下跌
items.summary_zh: 该模型可以通过快速发现和利用软件漏洞来显着提高网络安全风险，从而可能加速网络军备竞赛。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.
items.title_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官告诉 CNBC，世界“从未经历过”如此飙升的炼油利润
items.summary_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官 Patrick Pouyanné 谈论伊朗战争、与白宫达成的 10 亿美元协议、对美国的投资等。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙表示，从长远来看，伊朗战争使中东和平前景更好
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争爆发几周后，摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙对中东和平发表了乐观的看法。

items.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.
items.title_zh: Apollo 仅向投资者提供 150 亿美元私人信贷基金提款请求的 45%
items.summary_zh: 这些撤资表明，由于对软件公司私人信贷贷款的担忧，阿波罗并没有避免困扰竞争对手的投资者赎回潮。

items.title: Volume in stock and oil futures surged minutes before Trump's market-turning post
items.summary: The timing of the earlier volume spikes — across both equities and crude — caught the attention of traders.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普发表扭转市场的言论前几分钟，股票和石油期货成交量激增
items.summary_zh: 股票和原油早期成交量飙升的时机引起了交易员的注意。

items.title: Iran war splits older and younger conservatives - as pressure builds for Trump to find exit ramp
items.summary: More than a thousand miles from Washington, the conflict was a dominant topic of conversation at CPAC.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争使年长的保守派和年轻的保守派分裂——特朗普寻求退出坡道的压力越来越大
items.summary_zh: 这场冲突距离华盛顿一千多英里，是 CPAC 会议上的主要话题。

items.title: 'The gravest crime against humanity': What does the UN vote on slavery mean?
items.summary: African and Caribbean nations want countries which benefited from slavery to pay compensation but it will not be straightforward.
items.title_zh: “最严重的危害人类罪”：联合国对奴隶制的投票意味着什么？
items.summary_zh: 非洲和加勒比国家希望受益于奴隶制的国家支付赔偿，但这并不简单。

items.title: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
items.summary: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.
items.title_zh: 随着注意力转向伊朗，加沙和平疑虑加深
items.summary_zh: 随着世界关注伊朗战争，加沙接下来会发生什么的不确定性越来越大。

items.title: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
items.summary: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and photos - information, the FBI says, is "historical in nature".
items.title_zh: 伊朗支持的黑客入侵了联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔的个人电子邮件
items.summary_zh: 一个黑客组织分享了帕特尔所谓的简历和照片，联邦调查局称这些信息“本质上是历史性的”。

items.title: Rubio says US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks'
items.summary: Marco Rubio said US allies were open to helping escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has closed and threatened to charge fees for.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥表示美国预计“未来几周内”结束伊朗战争
items.summary_zh: 马可·卢比奥表示，美国盟友愿意帮助护送船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，伊朗已关闭该海峡并威胁要收取费用。

items.title: On Iran’s Rugged Frontier, Kurds Yearn to Join the Fight
items.summary: These groups’ dream has long been to establish federal autonomy, akin to that of their fellow Kurds in Iraq. With Iran’s leaders battered and degraded, they hope their moment has come.
items.title_zh: 在伊朗崎岖的边境上，库尔德人渴望加入战斗
items.summary_zh: 这些团体长期以来的梦想是建立联邦自治权，就像他们在伊拉克的库尔德同胞一样。随着伊朗领导人遭受重创和贬低，他们希望自己的时刻已经到来。

items.title: Halfway Through Lent, a Small Quebec Island Celebrates With Masks and Jigs
items.summary: Few islanders still observe Lent, but they cling to a tradition once seen as defying the all-powerful Roman Catholic Church.
items.title_zh: 四旬斋过半，魁北克小岛用面具和夹具庆祝
items.summary_zh: 很少有岛民仍然遵守四旬斋，但他们坚持曾经被视为反抗全能罗马天主教会的传统。

items.title: Castro Heirs Emerge Across Cuba’s Political Scene Amid Energy Crisis and Trump Threats
items.summary: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”
items.title_zh: 在能源危机和特朗普威胁下，卡斯特罗继承人出现在古巴政治舞台上
items.summary_zh: 随着特朗普官员要求改变，卡斯特罗家族成员突然出现在古巴的政治舞台上。甚至有人问：会不会是“古巴德尔西”？

items.title: Can This Russian Bakery Survive a 3,500% Tax Increase?
items.summary: The challenges faced by a small-business owner near Moscow highlight how Russia’s war-drained economy is on the doorstep of a major crisis.
items.title_zh: 这家俄罗斯面包店能承受 3500% 的增税吗？
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科附近一家小企业主所面临的挑战凸显了俄罗斯饱经战争的经济正处于一场重大危机的门口。

items.title: In Sleepy Town on Strait of Hormuz, War Rages Just Over Horizon
items.summary: For centuries, an Omani exclave has been defined by a peculiar duality: rugged isolation and proximity to one of the world’s most important trade routes.
items.title_zh: 在霍尔木兹海峡的沉睡小镇，战争在地平线上肆虐
items.summary_zh: 几个世纪以来，阿曼飞地一直具有独特的二元性：崎岖的偏僻和靠近世界上最重要的贸易路线之一。

items.title: Crypto stocks battered as Nasdaq enters correction in $17 trillion market rout
items.summary: The Friday plunge fits into a pattern since the war in Iran broke out, with gains on Monday turning into losses by the end of the week.
items.title_zh: 随着纳斯达克在 17 万亿美元的市场暴跌中进入调整，加密货币股票遭受重创
items.summary_zh: 周五的暴跌符合伊朗战争爆发以来的模式，周一的涨幅到本周末转为亏损。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE drops 3.2% as nearly all constituents decline
items.summary: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 0.8% from Thursday, was the only gainer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：AAVE 下跌 3.2%，几乎所有成分股均下跌
items.summary_zh: 比特币现金（BCH）较周四上涨 0.8%，是唯一上涨的股票。

items.title: Prediction markets top $20 billion in monthly volume as geopolitics now drives majority of activity: TRM Labs
items.summary: Prediction markets have surged past $20 billion in monthly volume, driven by geopolitics, U.S. politics, and macroeconomic event trading.
items.title_zh: 由于地缘政治现在推动了大部分活动，预测市场月交易量突破 200 亿美元：TRM Labs
items.summary_zh: 在地缘政治、美国政治和宏观经济事件交易的推动下，预测市场的月交易量已突破 200 亿美元。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
items.summary: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.
items.title_zh: 两艘前往古巴的援助船离开墨西哥后失踪
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥海军对向古巴运送援助物资的船只发起救援任务，古巴因美国禁运而面临食品和燃料短缺。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026

items.title: Bitcoin miners are becoming AI companies and selling their BTC to fund the transition
items.summary: The average public miner spent $79,995 to produce one bitcoin last quarter. Bitcoin is trading at $70,000. The math doesn't work, so the industry is pivoting to AI, taking on $70 billion in contracts, and liquidating bitcoin treasuries to finance the shift.
items.title_zh: 比特币矿工正在成为人工智能公司，并出售他们的比特币来为转型提供资金
items.summary_zh: 上个季度，公共矿工平均花费 79,995 美元生产一枚比特币。比特币的交易价格为 70,000 美元。数学不成立，因此该行业正在转向人工智能，签订了 700 亿美元的合同，并清算比特币国债来为这一转变提供资金。

items.title: Retail investors drive widespread bitcoin selling as prices fall
items.summary: Glassnode data shows distribution across cohorts as BTC falls below $67,000, with whales remaining largely neutral.
items.title_zh: 随着价格下跌，散户投资者推动比特币广泛抛售
items.summary_zh: Glassnode 数据显示，随着 BTC 跌破 67,000 美元，各群体的分布情况，鲸鱼基本上保持中立。

items.title: Ondo, Canton sidestep macro concerns with institutional deals as bitcoin, ether slide

items.title_zh: 随着比特币、以太币下滑，翁多和坎顿回避了对机构交易的宏观担忧
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 27 日天气预报

items.title: Miladys, loyalty pledge create ‘unnecessary cultural schism’ in Ethereum community
items.summary: "The issue is whether or not people support CROPS and going in that direction, the issue is how the EF is going about it,” Optimism's Mark Tyneway said.
items.title_zh: Miladys，忠诚承诺在以太坊社区造成“不必要的文化分裂”
items.summary_zh: “问题在于人们是否支持 CROPS 并朝这个方向发展，问题在于 EF 将如何实现这一目标，”Optimism 的马克·泰恩威 (Mark Tyneway) 说道。

items.title: Early bitcoin whale sends another $33 million to Binance, extending long-running exchange deposits
items.summary: An OG bitcoin whale has sent another $33 million worth of BTC to Binance as a possible selling spree continues amid market pressure.
items.title_zh: 早期的比特币鲸鱼又向币安发送了 3300 万美元，延长了长期的交易所存款
items.summary_zh: 一只 OG 比特币鲸鱼又向币安发送了价值 3300 万美元的 BTC，因为市场压力下可能会出现抛售狂潮。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to 'prepare for the worst'
items.summary: DBi's Andrew Beer suggests the market's crystal ball is broken.
items.title_zh: 为什么一位对冲基金资深人士敦促投资者“为最坏的情况做好准备”
items.summary_zh: DBi 的安德鲁·比尔 (Andrew Beer) 表示，市场的水晶球已经破碎。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
items.summary: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席杰伊·克莱顿表示，监管机构将在特朗普上任之前审查交易
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席克莱顿表示：“在任何公告之前，监管机构都会关注任何此类举措。”

items.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
items.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.
items.title_zh: 由于不良贷款增加，穆迪将 KKR 和未来标准运营的私人信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级
items.summary_zh: 穆迪此举是私人信贷陷入困境的最新迹象。散户投资者纷纷撤资，从黑石到阿波罗。

items.title: Nepal's ex-PM arrested over fatal protest crackdown
items.summary: More than 70 people were killed during an uprising last year which ousted Oli's government.
items.title_zh: 尼泊尔前总理因镇压致命抗议被捕
items.summary_zh: 去年推翻奥利政府的起义造成 70 多人死亡。

items.title: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
items.summary: Tiger Woods, the 15-time golf major champion, is released on bail following his arrest on charges of driving under the influence following a car crash in Florida.
items.title_zh: 泰格·伍兹因车祸后酒后驾驶被指控
items.summary_zh: 15 届高尔夫大满贯赛冠军泰格·伍兹 (Tiger Woods) 因在佛罗里达州发生车祸后酒后驾车被捕而被保释。

items.title: House Republicans reject Senate deal, prolonging partial US government shutdown
items.summary: Airport security agents have not been paid in more than a month due to a congressional impasse, causing travel chaos across the US.
items.title_zh: 众议院共和党人拒绝参议院协议，延长美国政府部分关闭时间
items.summary_zh: 由于国会僵局，机场安检人员已经一个多月没有拿到工资，导致美国各地的旅行陷入混乱。

items.title: Maldives tells UK it does not recognise Chagos Islands deal
items.summary: The Maldives is threatening international legal action to press its claim for control of the Chagos Islands.
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫告诉英国不承认查戈斯群岛协议
items.summary_zh: 马尔代夫威胁要采取国际法律行动，以强制其控制查戈斯群岛。

items.title: UAE and Qatar Arrest Hundreds Over Online Videos of Iranian Attacks
items.summary: The authorities have made a wave of arrests to stop people posting footage of strikes, citing security risks. Experts also see a fear of damage to the countries’ image as safe havens.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋和卡塔尔因伊朗袭击的在线视频而逮捕数百人
items.summary_zh: 当局以安全风险为由进行了一系列逮捕，以阻止人们发布罢工视频。专家们还担心这些国家作为避风港的形象会受到损害。

items.title: Nepal’s New Prime Minister, Former Rapper Balendra Shah, Sworn In
items.summary: A leaked report on the deadly violence and mass arson that broke out last year has put the new leader under pressure to ensure accountability.
items.title_zh: 尼泊尔新总理、前说唱歌手巴伦德拉·沙阿宣誓就职
items.summary_zh: 一份关于去年爆发的致命暴力和大规模纵火事件的泄露报告给新领导人带来了确保追究责任的压力。

items.title: U.S. May Label Brazilian Gangs as Terror Groups, After Push by the Bolsonaros
items.summary: The Trump administration is weighing declaring Brazil’s two largest drug gangs terrorist groups, after lobbying by the sons of jailed former President Jair Bolsonaro.
items.title_zh: 在博索纳罗家族推动下，美国可能将巴西帮派列为恐怖组织
items.summary_zh: 在被监禁的前总统雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗的儿子们进行游说后，特朗普政府正在考虑宣布巴西两个最大的贩毒团伙为恐怖组织。

items.title: U.N. Report Documents Sectarian Violence in Syria That Killed Over 1,700
items.summary: Investigators said the government of President Ahmed al-Sharaa had done little to address the extrajudicial killings and torture of Druse civilians in July 2025.
items.title_zh: 联合国报告记录了叙利亚发生的导致 1,700 多人死亡的宗派暴力事件
items.summary_zh: 调查人员表示，艾哈迈德·沙拉总统的政府几乎没有采取任何措施来解决 2025 年 7 月对德鲁兹平民的法外处决和酷刑问题。

items.title: Ripple turns to AI to stress-test the XRP Ledger as institutional use cases scale
items.summary: The next XRP Ledger release will be dedicated entirely to bug fixes and improvements.
items.title_zh: 随着机构用例规模的扩大，Ripple 转向人工智能对 XRP 账本进行压力测试
items.summary_zh: 下一个 XRP Ledger 版本将完全致力于错误修复和改进。

items.title: NYSE owner doubles down on Polymarket with fresh $600 million investment
items.summary: The parent company of the New York Stock Exchange is cementing its bet on the future of prediction markets, bringing its total commitment to nearly $2 billion.
items.title_zh: 纽约证券交易所所有者加倍投资 Polymarket，新投资 6 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 纽约证券交易所的母公司正在加大对预测市场未来的押注，使其承诺总额达到近 20 亿美元。

items.title: ‘What the hell?’ — Crypto frustration boils over as stablecoin fight stalls bill
items.summary: Frustrations are continuing to boil over in the crypto industry as it finds itself again at an impasse over the treatment of stablecoins.
items.title_zh: “到底是什么？”——随着稳定币之争拖延法案，加密货币的挫败感沸腾了
items.summary_zh: 加密行业的挫败感继续沸腾，因为它发现自己在稳定币的处理问题上再次陷入僵局。

items.title: Ripple CEO Garlinghouse touts ‘record’ Q1, cautions against policy weaponization derailing progress
items.summary: Largely optimistic the CLARITY Act will be passed, Brad Garlinghouse revised his prediction for when the legislation with be finalized.
items.title_zh: Ripple首席执行官加林豪斯吹捧第一季度“创纪录”，警告不要政策武器化破坏进展
items.summary_zh: 布拉德·加林豪斯 (Brad Garlinghouse) 对《清晰法案》的通过非常乐观，他修改了对立法何时最终确定的预测。

items.title: Crypto’s popularity among kids drove X Games-MoonPay deal: ‘New energy and new transformation’
items.summary: Crypto companies eager to attract new users have been sponsoring sports teams across various leagues for years.
items.title_zh: 加密货币在孩子们中的流行推动了 X Games 与 MoonPay 的交易：“新能源和新转型”
items.summary_zh: 渴望吸引新用户的加密货币公司多年来一直在赞助各个联盟的运动队。

items.title: Umbra opens privacy wallet to the public on Solana, powered by Arcium’s encrypted execution engine
items.summary: Umbra has opened its private wallet to the public, enabling shielded transfers, encrypted swaps, and compliance tools for Solana users.
items.title_zh: Umbra 在 Solana 上向公众开放隐私钱包，由 Arcium 的加密执行引擎提供支持
items.summary_zh: Umbra 已向公众开放其私人钱包，为 Solana 用户提供屏蔽传输、加密交换和合规工具。

items.title: NYSE parent ICE invests another $600 million in Polymarket, expanding bet on prediction markets
items.summary: NYSE parent ICE has invested another $600 million into Polymarket as prediction markets attract growing institutional interest.
items.title_zh: 纽约证券交易所母公司 ICE 向 Polymarket 追加投资 6 亿美元，扩大对预测市场的押注
items.summary_zh: 随着预测市场吸引了越来越多的机构兴趣，纽约证券交易所母公司 ICE 又向 Polymarket 投资了 6 亿美元。

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.

items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.

items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products

items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people

items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
